programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Jessica's college boyfriend, Oscar Chow, comes to visit. She's a bit miffed that Louis isn't a little more jealous but she's got a blind spot and is oblivious to the fact that Oscar is gay.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie visit an old-school general store filled with country road gold; a serious collector opens the doors to his empire of vintage coin-op scales.

programme.title: Alone
programme.sub-title: A Day In The Life Dug
programme.desc: Ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: Evidence of a continuous burn event in the swamp energizes the team, supporting the theory that a ship was burned and buried there centuries ago.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Forest Giants: A Taranaki couple fell giant rimu trees in privately-owned bush.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Family Land: A dairy farmer holds on tightly to her whanau land.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A 15-tonne water tanker has been swallowed by a sinkhole in Wokingham town centre. In Leicestershire, a BMW 3 Series has careered off a main country road, landing upside down in a ditch.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike, and Robbie head for the Hollywood Hills to pick a once-in-a-lifetime stockpile of amazing movie memorabilia.

programme.title: The Office U.S
programme.desc: Michael practices for the birth of Jan's baby by having Dwight go over possible birthing scenarios. Meanwhile, he tells Holly that he must pretend to dislike her for Jan's benefit.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Season Finale: When Louis and Jessica make changes to provide their family with a better life, they learn the changes come with their own set of challenges.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge recruits Chrissy Teigen and John Legend for an education-based proposal.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge compete to be the topic of Lisa's "Most Interesting Person I Know" essay.

programme.title: New: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A neighbour in Arizona creates a stink in an ongoing dispute over trash collection in South Carolina, a woman goes to battle with her neighbours over her passion for protecting wild geese.

programme.title: New: Customer Wars
programme.desc: At a diner in Breaux Bridge, Louisiana, a cancelled order leads to a confrontation between two customers and an employee.

programme.title: The Unxplained With William Shatner
programme.sub-title: Best Of: The End Of Days
programme.desc: Since the dawn of civilization, humanity has been fixated on predictions of the end times and their own demise.

programme.title: Outrageous Fortune
programme.desc: Cheryl and Pascalle sniff out something interesting about Loretta, while Van has the plan to end all plans.

programme.title: Head High
programme.desc: Renee and Gabrielle play tug of war; Vince walks into temptation; Saint Isaac’s College is rocked by a scandal.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny finds himself imprisoned in a quarry outside the Badlands where he meets a new, unexpected ally.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: While Sunny and Bajie struggle to stay alive, The Widow faces challenges as she consolidates her power, and MK discovers secrets about his past.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge recruits Chrissy Teigen and John Legend for an education-based proposal.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge compete to be the topic of Lisa's "Most Interesting Person I Know" essay.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: While selling a house, Jessica becomes superstitious; a new school counselor (Judah Friedlander) encourages Eddie to run for school president.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike, and Robbie head for the Hollywood Hills to pick a once-in-a-lifetime stockpile of amazing movie memorabilia.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: With winter quickly approaching and time running out, the fellowship unearths the most compelling evidence yet that a ship may have been buried deep in the swamp.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Island Farm: Farming on remote and beautiful D’Urville Island.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Alpaca Allure: A Hawke's Bay couple develop alpaca farming.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Rookie recovery op Joe has a challenge on his hands when a delivery van slides off the road. In Ruislip, there's a mammoth problem for recovery operator Michael.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Robbie unveils his big retro garage. In Southern California, the Wolfe brothers come face-to-face with the King of Signs, as well as discovering the Holy Grail of 3D signs.

programme.title: The Office U.S
programme.desc: After the office gets robbed, Michael decides to hold an auction to raise money for all the items lost.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Still homeless, the Huangs move in with Honey and Marvin; Jessica gets a chance to compete on "Wheel of Fortune"; Eddie starts high school; Michael Bolton offers Louis some help.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart accidentally sees a new superhero movie a month before it comes out - and the world cowers before his newfound plot-spoiling powers.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Marge implements a screen time limit for the whole family, she realises that she is the one addicted – not Homer and the kids.

programme.title: New: Rookie Truckers
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Rookie Truckers follows the gritty and gripping journey as new recruits become road warriors in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: When a tourist goes missing, it's panic stations for the Clermont Diggers. And in Ballarat, Pretty Prospector April is in the line of fire, when Ian’s homemade trommel “Jaws” comes off the rails.

programme.title: Outrageous Fortune
programme.desc: Van, the legend, makes a new best friend. Judd gets a big cheque and a new associate - if an old adversary doesn't stuff things up.

programme.title: Head High
programme.desc: As both teams compete in the 1A semi-finals, Mana has some devastating news for Renee.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny and Bajie meet a powerful warrior with a tragic past reminiscent of Sunny's own. The Widow prepares for a showdown and MK learns a secret.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: The Widow's fight for liberation puts her in an epic showdown with the other Barons who have joined forces against her, while Quinn enacts his revenge.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.desc: Bart accidentally sees a new superhero movie a month before it comes out - and the world cowers before his newfound plot-spoiling powers.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Marge implements a screen time limit for the whole family, she realises that she is the one addicted – not Homer and the kids.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: When Louis and Jessica are pressured into volunteering due to budget cuts at school, the kids see a new side of their parents.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Robbie unveils his big retro garage. In Southern California, the Wolfe brothers come face-to-face with the King of Signs, as well as discovering the Holy Grail of 3D signs.

programme.desc: Ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators and a host of exhausting challenges.
